Document:
# Planes and Aberrant Species
As of the year 2523, the existence of what's known as the [color=blue][bold]Versuis[/bold][/color], informally the Planes, has become public knowledge to the vast galactic empires. Originally discovered by the Collective of Nuunis, further discoveries have included the existence of [color=blue]Stablo Mjehurića[/color], or the World Tree, and a variety of Planes sporting sentient life.
These species that originate from within the Versuis are known as [color=yellow]aberrant species[/color], and feature a variety of phenomena that are practically unheard of within the concurrent plane.
## Stablo Mjehurića
The World Tree is the grand creation that allows for the Versuis and the connections between the Planes to exist.
The inhabitants of the Torus were the first to know and explain to the concurrent plane exactly what the World Tree was, primarily due to an inherent connection and vast heaps of knowledge on it and the connections it brought. An ancient book, the Mjehuricon, is a general lexicon tome of knowledge about the Stablo Mjehurića, the Torus, and the Beyond.
Stablo Mjehurića will sometimes produce Amber, responsible for the binding magic of the tree. Certain species from the Torus have an inherent connection to this Amber, though this phenomenon is still not quite studied.
## The Rift
The Rift is the nothingness between Planes.
Residents of the Torus known as the Monster-Handlers have the only knowledge about the Rift, and it's... rather limited as well.
[bold]Anyone that enters the Rift does not return.[/bold]
## Known Planes
The known Planes are as follows: - [textlink="The Dark"link="TheDark"] - [textlink="The Tertiaryie"link="Nightmares"] - The Torus - Aurorasphere
